Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutant Mayhem (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $118,700,272Details
International Box Office $61,629,593
Worldwide Box Office $180,329,865
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,125,195
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,257,339
Total $6,382,534
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After years of being sheltered from the human world, the Turtle brothers set out to win the hearts of New Yorkers and be accepted as normal teenagers through heroic acts. Their new friend April O’Neil helps them take on a mysterious crime syndicate, but they soon get in over their heads when an army of mutants is unleashed upon them.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$28,007,544 (23.6% of total gross)
Legs:4.24 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:65.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$70,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,858 opening theaters/3,950 max. theaters, 6.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $129,767,387

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 2nd, 2023 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: August 2nd, 2023 (Wide) (Sweden)
August 3rd, 2023 (Wide) (Germany)
August 3rd, 2023 (Wide), released as Ninja Korytnačky: Mutantský chaos (Slovakia)
August 3rd, 2023 (Wide), released as Želvy Ninja: Mutantí chaos (Czech Republic)
August 4th, 2023 (Wide), released as Wojownicze Żółwie Ninja (Poland)
Video Release: September 1st, 2023 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for sequences of violence and action, language and impolite material.
(Rating bulletin 2791 (cert #54215), 7/12/2023)
Running Time: 100 minutes
Franchise: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead, Reboot
Filming location (country): Canada, France
Geographical setting: New York, New York City
Plot point: Investigative Journalist, Mutants, Talking Animals
Social setting: Organized Crime
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Nickelodeon Animation, Point Grey
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

After years of being sheltered from the human world, the Turtle brothers set out to win the hearts of New Yorkers and be accepted as normal teenagers through heroic acts. Their new friend April O’Neil helps them take on a mysterious crime syndicate, but they soon get in over their heads when an army of mutants is unleashed upon them.
